verdict_reason: Config record follows the documented @ConfigurationProperties best practice (@Validated + Jakarta @NotBlank), is correctly registered and env-sourced with fail-fast binding, and is integration-tested via the Service Bus emulator; only a Minor defensive toString-redaction suggestion for the SAS secret

todos.issue: Record auto-generates toString() that includes the full SAS connectionString, so any future logging of the config bean (or a framework error report rendering it) would leak the SharedAccessKey
todos.fix: Override toString() in the record to redact connectionString (e.g. print queue only, mask the connection string)
